dj_text: That was Suspekt - Gonzo (Tivoli d. 24 maj 2019). Now 100% Jesus. I don't do smooth transitions.
commercial_text: If you're enjoying That Pirate Bot DJ Radio, tell a friend. If you're not enjoying it, tell an enemy.
hijack_text: You've stumbled onto Nostalgia Overload Radio from the Timel
recovery_text: They're gone. We're back. Don't ask which 'they' — you don't want to know.
title: 100% Jesus
